1) Project Overview
===================



| Executive Summary Status | **Oracle Cloud Infrastructure JIRAcustomfield\_10301,customfield\_11140,customfield\_13217RYG Status,GA Date,Executive Summary 21key = FAAASPMO-1137 7dc25513-b840-3650-9d17-2a9f1a9822f6** |
| Architecture / Product Definition | * Design: [RODS Support for Dynamic Tables Replication](https://confluence.oraclecorp.com/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?spaceKey=OCIADP&title=RODS+Support+for+Dynamic+Tables+Replication)
 |
| Project Scope | * RODS is being enhanced to replicate **runtime-created dynamic/temporary tables** from **Fusion DB (FA DB)** to **Fusion ADW (FA ADW)** using **wildcard table-name patterns**, ensuring these transient tables and their dependent objects (editioning views, indexes) are automatically included during **provisioning** and **FA update/patch** workflows. The solution sources wildcard patterns from **XDF UDP****`TableNamePatterns`**, publishes them in the **RODS Manifest** via HCP, and updates **ADP bootstrap + GoldenGate** so both **initial bootstrap (Data Pump)** and **ongoing DDL/DML replication (GoldenGate)** cover all tables matched by the patterns.
 |
| Project Jira Links(Samples) | * [[FAAASPMO-1137] Bug 38242185: SUPPORT RODS REPLICATION FOR dynamically-created FA tables using wildcards](https://jira.oci.oraclecorp.com/browse/FAAASPMO-1137)
* [[FAAASINGES-2133] Bug 38242185: SUPPORT RODS REPLICATION FOR dynamically-created FA tables using wildcards -](https://jira.oci.oraclecorp.com/browse/FAAASINGES-2133)
 |
| Project Repository |  *[OraDOCS-FAaaS TPM Project Folder](https://oradocs.oracle.com/documents/folder/FAD787DC7A8210FEA9D68165BF194430072828036C9A)* |

expected_extraction.project_name: RODS Support for Dynamic Tables Replication
expected_extraction.project_overview: RODS is being enhanced to replicate runtime-created dynamic/temporary tables from Fusion DB (FA DB) to Fusion ADW (FA ADW) using wildcard table-name patterns, ensuring these transient tables and dependent objects are included during provisioning and FA update/patch workflows. The solution sources patterns from XDF UDP TableNamePatterns, publishes them in the RODS Manifest via HCP, and updates ADP bootstrap + GoldenGate so both initial bootstrap (Data Pump) and ongoing DDL/DML replication cover all matched tables.
expected_extraction.executive_summary_status_raw: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure JIRA customfield_10301, customfield_11140, customfield_13217 RYG Status, GA Date, Executive Summary 21 key = FAAASPMO-1137 7dc25513-b840-3650-9d17-2a9f1a9822f6
expected_extraction.rag_summary: RAG: Amber — Most WBS items are marked complete and BETA AMS testing is progressing, but there are still open lower-stack bugs (e.g., FAAASHCP-50226) and recent testing required code fixes, creating residual delivery risk.
expected_extraction.schedule_health: At risk — Several tasks lack explicit due dates (limiting schedule confidence), and while BETA deployment/testing has advanced through late March, recent issues requiring fixes plus open lower-stack bugs indicate potential slippage risk for final validation/signoff.

blocking_issues.description: Lower stack issue: FAAASHCP-50226 — BETA:AMS: PREPARE_FILE_SYSTEM failed on OHS1
Issue encountered during testing: IACS introduced new workflow and impacted changes introduced for this project (noted 3/11 under ADP Dev Testing)
blocking_issues.owner: ADP (Rahul / Satya Gokavarapu listed as owners for ADP Dev Testing)

blocking_issues.description: Open bug referenced in Bug Tracking: FAAASHCP-47871 (link truncated in source)

next_steps.action: Review the test plan and provide signoff.
Run identified ADP validation test cases for BETA AMS per the agreed testing plan.
Resolve and retest lower-stack BETA AMS issue FAAASHCP-50226 (PREPARE_FILE_SYSTEM failed on OHS1).

exec_asks.ask: Provide some PHX/IAD BETA pods to start testing (BETA is an option if ADP can help provide pods).

recent_updates_by_date.summary: HCP completed BETA AMS test cases with no outstanding issues; synced with ADP on testing plan and ADP validation test cases.
Rahul/Raghav to review the test plan and sign off.
BETA AMS testing status: 12 of 15 test cases in progress and 2 completed; deployment to Beta completed (ADP Dev Testing).

expected_extraction.agenda_email_eml_draft:
Subject: Weekly Status — RODS Support for Dynamic Tables Replication (FAAASPMO-1137)
To: <add distribution list>
Cc: <add stakeholders>

Team,

Agenda for this week’s tracking meeting:

1) ORM Status
- Not provided on source page (ORM ticket placeholder present).

2) Overall Health
- rag_summary: RAG: Amber — Most WBS items are marked complete and BETA AMS testing is progressing, but there are still open lower-stack bugs (e.g., FAAASHCP-50226) and recent testing required code fixes, creating residual delivery risk.
- schedule_health: At risk — Several tasks lack explicit due dates (limiting schedule confidence), and while BETA deployment/testing has advanced through late March, recent issues requiring fixes plus open lower-stack bugs indicate potential slippage risk for final validation/signoff.

3) Blocking Issues / Risks
- FAAASHCP-50226 (BETA:AMS PREPARE_FILE_SYSTEM failed on OHS1) — Owner: HCP Team — Target: TBD — Critical path: Yes
- Testing impacted by IACS workflow changes requiring code fixes (noted 3/11) — Owner: ADP (Rahul/Satya) — Target: TBD — Critical path: Yes
- FAAASHCP-47871 (open; link truncated) — Owner: HCP Team — Target: TBD — Critical path: No

4) Workstream Next Steps
- ADP:
  - Review test plan and sign off (Rahul/Raghav) — by 3/25
  - Execute ADP validation test cases in BETA AMS — this sprint
- HCP:
  - Drive closure/verification of FAAASHCP-50226 and confirm BETA AMS stability — next week
- SCM:
  - No new action explicitly stated in latest updates (confirm if any new .table file/patch follow-ups are needed).
- FAaaS:
  - No new action explicitly stated in latest updates (dev marked complete; confirm any remaining regression/signoff needs).

5) Executive Asks / Decisions Needed
- Environment support: ADP to provide PHX/IAD BETA pods to start/continue testing (if needed) — Owner: ADP — Decision/assistance: allocate pods.

Thanks,
<Your Name>
